data.title: Tesla To $351? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
Why Is Clean Tech Company N2OFF Stock Jumping Premarket Friday?
data.description: N2OFF's stock surges after signing LOI with SBSI for renewable energy projects in Italy. N2OFF will hold approximately 70% ownership in the projects.

data.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Quanta Services 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Carvana Chart Weakens As Momentum Indicators Turn Bearish, Short Report Hits
data.description: Carvana stock has seen a rollercoaster ride for investors, with a huge rally but also a recent dip. Its stock chart shows a bearish trend and a scathing report from Hindenburg may add fuel to the fire. Investors should be cautious.

data.title: Applied Materials, Coupang, Starbucks And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: Last month, Morgan Stanley's Joseph Moore downgraded Applied Materials from Equal-Weight to Underweight, lowering the price target to $164.
